---
title: "ENV DS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-05"
---

# Madre de Dios, Peru

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(viridis)
d01_08=read_csv("C:/Users/yllw1/OneDrive/Desktop/Data-399/Project Data + Resources/Data/Alvarez-Berrios_etal_2021_Data_2001_2008.csv")
d09_14=read_csv("C:/Users/yllw1/OneDrive/Desktop/Data-399/Project Data + Resources/Data/Alvarez-Berrios_etal_2021_Data_2009_2014.csv")

```

```{r}
head(d01_08)
head(d09_14)
```

```{r}
df <- bind_rows(d01_08, d09_14) %>%
  mutate(
    area_km2 = area_m2 / 1e6,
    dist_km  = disttonavriv / 1000,
    is_protected = anp_name != "NONE")
```

```{r}
df=df%>%
  filter(year!=2012 & year!=2002)
```

```{r}
df %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(total_km2 = sum(area_km2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = total_km2)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mining-related deforestation (sq km)",
    title = "Total mining-related deforestation by year"
  )+
  theme_bw()


```

```{r}
# total deforestation by year for each district
district_year <- df %>%
  group_by(year, districtcode) %>%
  summarise(total_km2 = sum(area_km2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(district_year, aes(x = year, y = total_km2,color=districtcode)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  facet_wrap(~ districtcode) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Deforestation (sq km)",
    title = "Mining-related deforestation by district over time"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
df %>%
  group_by(year, zona_miner) %>%
  summarise(total_km2 = sum(area_km2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(zona_miner = factor(zona_miner)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = total_km2, fill = zona_miner)) +
  geom_area() +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Deforestation (sq km)",
    fill = "Mining Coridor",
    title = "Deforestation by mining corridor indicator (zona_miner)"
  )+
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
hex_xy=df %>%
  group_by(unq, x_coord, y_coord) %>%
  summarise(cum_km2 = sum(area_km2, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

hex_xy %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = x_coord, y = y_coord, z = cum_km2)) +
  stat_summary_2d(bins = 220, fun = sum) +
  scale_fill_viridis(option='H',begin=0,end=1)+
  labs(
    x = "X Coordinate",
    y = "Y Coordinate",
    fill = "Deforestation (sq km)",
    title = "Intensity of Deforestation in Madre De Dios, 2001–2014"
  )+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(legend.position = "top")

```

# Global Data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
```

```{r}
drivers <- read_csv("C:/Users/yllw1/OneDrive/Desktop/Data-399/Project Data + Resources/Data/Country_Drivers.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
loss <- read_csv("C:/Users/yllw1/OneDrive/Desktop/Data-399/Project Data + Resources/Data/Country_Tree_Cover_Loss.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
```

```{r}
drivers <- drivers %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(country, threshold, driver, year, tc_loss_ha)

loss <- loss %>%
  clean_names()

mining <- drivers %>%
  filter(driver == "Hard commodities", threshold == 30)
```

```{r}
loss_long <- loss %>%
  filter(threshold == 30) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("tc_loss_ha_"),
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "total_tc_loss_ha"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = str_remove(year, "tc_loss_ha_"),
    year = as.numeric(year)
  )
```

```{r}
fig1_data <- mining %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(mining_loss_ha = sum(tc_loss_ha, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(fig1_data, aes(x = year, y = mining_loss_ha)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Global Mining-Related Tree Cover Loss Over Time",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Tree cover loss (ha)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
fig2_data <- mining %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  summarise(total_mining_loss_ha = sum(tc_loss_ha, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_mining_loss_ha)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

ggplot(fig2_data, aes(x = reorder(country, total_mining_loss_ha), y = total_mining_loss_ha)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Top 10 Countries by Mining-Related Tree Cover Loss",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total tree cover loss (ha)"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
top_countries <- mining %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  summarise(total_mining_loss_ha = sum(tc_loss_ha, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_mining_loss_ha)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 8) %>%
  pull(country)

fig3_data <- mining %>%
  filter(country %in% top_countries)

ggplot(fig3_data, aes(x = year, y = tc_loss_ha, color = country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Mining-Related Tree Cover Loss Over Time by Country",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Tree cover loss (ha)",
    color = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
selected_countries <- top_countries

fig4_data <- drivers %>%
  filter(threshold == 30, country %in% selected_countries) %>%
  group_by(country, driver) %>%
  summarise(total_loss_ha = sum(tc_loss_ha, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(fig4_data, aes(x = country, y = total_loss_ha, fill = driver)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Tree Cover Loss by Driver in Selected Countries",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total tree cover loss (ha)",
    fill = "Driver"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
fig8_data <- mining %>%
  filter(country %in% top_countries) %>%
  arrange(country, year) %>%
  group_by(country) %>%
  mutate(cumulative_loss_ha = cumsum(tc_loss_ha)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(fig8_data, aes(x = year, y = cumulative_loss_ha, color = country)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  labs(
    title = "Cumulative Mining-Related Tree Cover Loss",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Cumulative loss (ha)",
    color = "Country"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```
